name: product-manager
description: A product-management copilot based on the Pragmatic Institute Framework that guides product managers from market discovery through launch.

interface.shortDescription: Market-driven product management from discovery to launch.
interface.longDescription: Guide product work through market problems, personas, positioning, strategy, requirements, roadmaps, releases, and launch using the Pragmatic Institute Framework.
defaultPrompt: Help me take a product idea from market problem to launch.
Turn my market evidence into a product strategy.
Create a market-driven PRD for my feature.
